---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom-whitehead-33a319131/
    - icon: github
      text: Work Github
      href: https://github.com/intellegenstom
    - icon: github
      text: Personal Github
      href: https://github.com/tangoed2whiskey

---

This blog is written by [Tom Whitehead](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom-whitehead-33a319131/). I am the Head of Machine Learning at [Intellegens](https://intellegens.com/), where we develop and deploy a machine learning toolkit for experimental design in the materials, chemicals, formulations, and life sciences industry. I have a background in physics and machine learning, and enjoy solving and writing about complex problems in these fields.
